svg.title: Invoice Generator + Documenso — System Architecture
svg.desc: Full system architecture showing frontend, backend, Documenso integration, and data flow

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Auth feature module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Invoice Builder module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PDF generation module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Signature module')
sendPrompt('What API routes does Auth need?')
sendPrompt('What API routes does the invoice module need?')
sendPrompt('What does the PDF generation API do?')
sendPrompt('How does the signature API connect to Documenso?')
sendPrompt('What does the invoice service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the PDF service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the signature service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the email service do?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the Draft stage?')
sendPrompt('What happens when invoice is sent?')
sendPrompt('How does the signing flow work?')
sendPrompt('What happens after an invoice is signed?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an invoice is paid?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the User model need?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the Invoice model need?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the LineItem model need?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the Signature model need?')
sendPrompt('What should the Minimal invoice template look like?')
sendPrompt('What should the Professional invoice template look like?')
sendPrompt('What should the Modern invoice template look like?')
sendPrompt('How should custom invoice templates work?')
